@graph.description: This experiment measures l2-load-latency in a two-node setup with MoonGen on one node as the load generator and libmoon on another node as the forwarding device under test. The benchmark tests different packet rates and packet sizes. Each measurement runs for fixed duration, records energy consumption on both machines, and stores latency histograms as CSV data and PNG plots for every parameter combination.
@graph.name: MoonGen Load Latency Benchmarks

@graph.description: The pos Framework: A Methodology and Toolchain for Reproducible Network Experiments

@graph.description: Bootstraps the node, sets up the environment and deploys pos tools.

@graph.name: reset
setup-dut
@graph.description: Prepares the DUT node by building libmoon and enabling hugepage support. It also disables CPU turbo boost for more stable forwarding measurements.

@graph.name: setup-loadgen
@graph.description: Prepares the load-generator node by building MoonGen from the provided repository and branch. Additionally, it enables hugepage support for packet generation and latency measurements.
Copies file from /home/anonymous/experiments/experiments/loop-experiment-llm/evaluation/plot_latency.py to MoonGen/plot_latency.py on node cesis.
@graph.name: latency-plot-script
loadgen-l2-load-latency_run0
@graph.description: Runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example using the selected transmit and receive ports and histogram output paths.

@graph.name: histogram-latencies_run0.csv
@graph.description: Uploaded latency histogram CSV for one benchmark iteration containing the latency-distribution data produced for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.

@graph.name: histogram-latencies_run0.png
@graph.description: Uploaded latency histogram plot for one benchmark iteration of the MoonGen L2 load-latency experiment. It visualizes the filtered latency distribution for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.
Energy measurement during experiment on node cesis. The measurement is done using a GUDE Power Unit providing current, voltage and power consumption values.
@graph.name: measurement_run0.csv
moongen-load-generator
@graph.description: Looped benchmark that iterates over all configured packet-rate and packet-size combinations, synchronizes with the DUT, records node energy usage and runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example. Afterwards it uploads the generated latency histogram and plot.

@graph.name: moongen-load-generator_run0
@graph.description: Each iteration runs the MoonGen l2-load-latency script with different values for packet rate and packet size, storing the measured latencies in a CSV file, generating a plot, and uploading both artifacts after each run.

@graph.name: dut-l2-load-latency_run0
@graph.description: Runs libmoon's l2-forward example so the DUT forwards traffic during the load-generator measurement window.
Energy measurement during experiment on node nida. The measurement is done using a GUDE Power Unit providing current, voltage and power consumption values.
@graph.name: dut_measurement_run0.csv
l2-forwarder
@graph.description: Forwarder that synchronizes with the load-generator node, records energy usage and forwards the received packets back to the load-generator node.

@graph.name: l2-forwarder_run0
@graph.description: Each iteration runs the libmoon l2-forward script to forward the received packets from the loadgen node.
